summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PartyTees MVP - Shopify-style store for custom party t-shirts. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI working with minor navigation flow considerations.

design_issues.flow: Party Builder Step 2 to Step 3 navigation
design_issues.issue: Next Step button correctly disabled when no photo uploaded - this is expected behavior but could be clearer to users

passed_tests: All 16 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Homepage hero section and navigation links functional
Template Gallery page with all filters (All, Stag, Hen, Popular, New) working
Party Builder page template selection in Step 1 working
Party Builder Bulk vs Multi-Design mode toggle functional
Party Builder GDPR consent checkbox in Step 2 working
Shopping Cart empty state displayed correctly
Admin Dashboard stats display and order list working
FAQ page accordion functionality working perfectly
Template filtering by category and popularity

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major UI flows working, minor UX consideration on photo upload requirement
